---
title: ""
output: html_document
date: ''
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<font size=6>**1. Decipher the functions of human brain related disease-associated common genetic variants**</font>  
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>I utilize Hi-C/HiChIP to link the human brain related disease-associated common genetic variants to their cognate genes.</font>    
<br>
<br>
<font size=6>**2. Predict the functions of Cis-Regulatory Elements in gene transcription**</font>    
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>I am trying to build deep learning models including Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), Residual Networks (ResNet), and Transformer to predict the roles of Cis-Regulatory Elements (CREs) in gene transcription.</font>
